bugs.description: The IMO check digit algorithm uses the wrong weights. The first six digits must be multiplied by 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2 from left to right, but this code uses 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, which will reject valid IMO numbers and accept invalid ones.
The code removes every occurrence of "IMO" anywhere in the input instead of only accepting it as an optional prefix. Inputs like "12IMO34567" would be treated as validly formatted.
